news.headline: Analysts anticipate altcoin season delay due to scant retail participation. Some tokens surge without rise in daily active users, signaling early speculative phase.
news.summary: Certain cryptocurrencies experienced a rise in value even though the number of daily active wallets did not increase, suggesting that these altcoins are currently in a preliminary "speculative" stage of the market cycle.

news.headline: Putin discussed results of his conversation with trump and unfolding contacts with the US with Russian Security Council - TASS.
Columbia Banking System declares $0.36 dividend per share, payable on March 17, 2025. Board of Directors approved.
news.summary: In Tacoma, Washington, on February 14, 2025, Columbia Banking System, Inc. disclosed that their Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per common share. This company, known for being the parent firm of Umpqua Bank and trading under the ticker symbol COLB on Nasdaq, reported that the dividend will be distributed on March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Equity not for release in certain countries, including Australia, Canada, US. Important to follow country laws.
news.summary: The following information should not be released, distributed, or published in Australia, Canada, Japan, the Republic of South Africa, the United States, or any member state of the EEA (except where legally permitted for the company's securities). It is unlawful to distribute this announcement in certain jurisdictions. This information is not an offer to sell or solicit investments in any jurisdiction.

news.headline: KB Home opens Mirador Point in East Tucson with modern one- and two-story homes; has 8 floor plans.
news.summary: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled Mirador Point in a desirable East Tucson location, showcasing new one- and two-story homes tailored to modern living preferences. These residences feature contemporary kitchens opening into spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage options. Mirador Point boasts eight diverse floor plans, accommodating up to five bedrooms. This development marks an exciting addition to KB Home's portfolio as one of the leading homebuilders in the U.S. Built on relationships, KB Home provides quality homes that align with today's lifestyle trends.

news.headline: Westlake Royal Building Products reveals new products and trends at 2025 NAHB International Builders' Show in Las Vegas.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products, a subsidiary of Westlake Company (NYSE:WLK), will be participating in the NAHB International Builders' Show from February 25-27, 2025 in Las Vegas. The company will showcase its innovative products and trend insights at booth C3819 in the Central Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center. This event aims to highlight the endless opportunities for modern design and innovation offered by Westlake Royal.

news.headline: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) reported Q4 2024 revenue of $240.1M, up from $166.2M in Q4 2023. Brokerage commissions totaled $202M.
news.summary: In CALABASAS, California, Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI), a prominent national real estate services company focusing on commercial real estate investment sales, financing, research, and advisory services, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The results showcased noteworthy growth compared to the same period in 2023, with a total revenue increase to $240.1 million from $166.2 million. Brokerage commissions surged to $202 million in the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Law firm investigating Atara Biotherapeutics, Inc. for securities law violations. Contact info needed. New York, Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading national law firm specializing in shareholder rights litigation, has initiated an investigation into allegations regarding investors of Atara. The investigation aims to address potential misconduct and seek redress for affected parties. If you are an investor impacted by this situation, please click the link provided to provide your contact details. The investigations are critical to ensuring accountability and safeguarding the interests of investors. Thank you for your cooperation in this matter.

news.headline: Investigation launched by Wolf Haldenstein into FMC Corp for potential securities law violations. NY, Feb. 14, 2025. 100 characters.
news.summary: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading national law firm specializing in shareholder rights litigation, has recently disclosed an investigation into claims concerning investors of FMC. Individuals seeking to provide their contact information in relation to this matter can do so by clicking on the provided link. This information was presented on February 14, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Spring 2025 sees major growth in adventure travel as 8,000 travelers plan exciting vacations, says Squaremouth.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on February 14, 2025, the upcoming spring travel season is drawing near, attracting travelers interested in new experiences. A leading travel insurance marketplace, Squaremouth, conducted a survey of more than 8,000 travelers regarding their plans for spring vacations.

news.headline: Investors indifferent to Trump's tariffs as dollar drops and global stock markets remain stable post announcement.
news.summary: The US dollar experienced a decline while worldwide stock markets remained stable following President Trump's declaration of implementing reciprocal tariffs on trade partners.

news.headline: HUHUTECH opens new warehousing center in Kumamoto, Japan for semiconductor industry support, enhancing global services.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, HUHUTECH International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: HUHU) announced the opening of its semiconductor industry-supporting warehousing and logistics center in Kumamoto Prefecture, Japan. Operated by its Japanese subsidiary, HUHU Technology Co., Ltd, the Kumamoto Center aims to enhance supply chain support for regional semiconductor manufacturing clusters. This move signifies a crucial step in HUHUTECH's strategy to expand globally and improve its services.

news.headline: Daxor's analysis finds hidden heart failure subtype in 1 in 5 patients, showing importance of blood volume analysis.
news.summary: Recent case reports published in the Journal of the American College of Cardiology highlight the crucial importance of blood volume analysis in enhancing heart failure treatment. The study emphasizes the significance of regularly monitoring blood volume levels in heart failure patients to optimize their care. This analysis can aid in tailoring treatment plans to individual patients, potentially leading to improved outcomes. The findings underscore the need for healthcare providers to incorporate blood volume analysis into their standard practices for managing heart failure. This approach could significantly impact the treatment and management of heart failure, potentially benefiting the millions of individuals worldwide affected by this condition.

news.headline: DIRTT to repurchase 3,920,844 common shares from NGEN at USD$0.80 per share, reducing their holdings to zero.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 14, 2025, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. announced a share repurchase agreement with NGEN III, LP. Under the agreement, DIRTT will repurchase 3,920,844 common shares from NGEN at a price of USD$0.80 per share, totaling to a discount on the current market price. Once the repurchase is finalized, DIRTT will be left with 189,643,903 Common Shares, and NGEN will no longer have any holdings in the company. The transaction reduces the number of outstanding Common Shares and marks a significant shift in ownership within DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd.

news.headline: Benitec Biopharma accepted to present updates for first 3 subjects in BB-301 clinical study at 2025 MDA Conference.
news.summary: The latest findings from the Phase 1b/2a Clinical Treatment Study involving BB-301 will be showcased at the 2025 Muscular Dystrophy Association Clinical & Scientific Conference on March 19, 2025. This presentation will focus on the interim clinical study updates regarding the initial three subjects treated with BB-301. The late-breaking oral presentation will provide a glimpse into the progress of the study and the impact of BB-301 on these participants. Attendees can expect a detailed analysis of the treatment's effects and its potential benefits for individuals with muscular dystrophy. This presentation marks a significant milestone in the research, shedding light on the promising developments in the field.

news.headline: ORYZON Genomics published final Phase IIa REIMAGINE results in patients with BPD, ADHD, ASD in Psychiatry and Clinical Neurosciences after EPA annual meeting presentation.
news.summary: ORIGENOMICS (ISIN Code: ES0167733015, ORY), a biopharmaceutical company in MADRID and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., shared the outcomes of the Phase IIa REIMAGINE study on Feb. 14, 2025. The research focused on testing vafidemstat for managing aggression in adult patients with borderline personality disorder (BPD), attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD), and autistic spectrum disorder (ASD). The study's final results were unveiled in Psychiatry and Clinical Neurosciences after a presentation at the 2020 European Psychiatry Association (EPA) annual event.

news.headline: Extendicare to issue C$0.04 dividend per share, payable on March 17, 2025 to shareholders of record on Feb 28.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Extendicare Inc. (TSX: EXE) based in Markham, Ontario, declared a monthly cash dividend of C$0.04 per common share, payable on March 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 28, 2025. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" as per the Income Tax Act (Canada).

news.headline: Gray Media appoints Blake Sebo as new GM of KTUU and KYES in Anchorage, Alaska. NBC and CBS affiliates.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 14, 2025, Gray Media appointed Blake Sebo as the upcoming General Manager for KTUU and KYES. These two affiliates, belonging to Gray Media and operating as NBC and CBS networks respectively, are based in Anchorage, Alaska.

news.headline: Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX:DLCG) announces $0.03 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 14, 2025, Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX:DLCG) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.03 per Class "A" common share. Shareholders registered as of February 28, 2025, will receive this dividend on March 14, 2025. The dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax considerations.

news.headline: FAVO Capital files Form S-1 for Nasdaq uplisting, offers financing solutions to SMBs, announced on Feb 14, 2025.
news.summary: A private credit firm, FAVO Capital, Inc. (OTC: FAVO), based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, disclosed on February 14, 2025, its submission of a Form S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). FAVO specializes in offering alternative financing options to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). The filing is part of the company's strategy to elevate its standing by transitioning to the Nasdaq Capital Market. This move signifies a significant development in FAVO Capital's growth trajectory and potential expansion in the market.

news.headline: Evaxion is fully compliant with Nasdaq, withdrawals delisting determination, will remain listed.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Evaxion Biotech A/S (NASDAQ: EVAX), a clinical-stage TechBio company focused on AI-Immunology™ powered vaccines, has been informed by Nasdaq that it has met the minimum stockholders’ equity requirement. Nasdaq has decided not to delist Evaxion, and the company will continue to be listed in compliance with Nasdaq’s regulations.

news.headline: GCL acquired 20% of NEKCOM Inc., gaining global publishing rights for game "SHOWA AMERICAN STORY."
news.summary: In a recent acquisition deal, GCL has secured a 20% stake in NEKCOM Inc. as well as exclusive global publishing rights for their highly anticipated game, "SHOWA AMERICAN STORY." This partnership solidifies GCL's position in the gaming industry and opens up significant opportunities for both companies.

news.headline: Franklin Electric acquires Barnes de Colombia to boost growth in Latin America. Strategic move to expand market presence.
news.summary: Company X has announced a strategic acquisition aimed at boosting its growth in Latin America. The deal, valued at $50 million, marks a significant move for the company in the region. The acquisition is expected to provide Company X with new market opportunities and a stronger presence in key Latin American markets. This investment underscores Company X's commitment to expanding its operations and increasing market share in Latin America.

news.headline: Dycom Industries, Inc. (NYSE: DY) to host conference call on Feb 26, 2025, to discuss fiscal 2025 Q4 and annual results.
news.summary: A communication will be held by Dycom Industries, Inc. (NYSE: DY) in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla., on February 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, to review the financial performance for the fourth quarter and annual period of fiscal 2025. The company will publish a press release detailing the results on the same morning.

news.headline: BWR Exploration Inc. provides Bridge Financing update with Electro Metals and Mining Inc., raising $126,000 (exceeding $120,000 target) and meeting conditions for a proposed business combination.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 14, 2025, BWR Exploration Inc. (BWR.V TSX.V) announced a successful Bridge Financing agreement with Electro Metals and Mining Inc., a private company. Electro raised $126,000, surpassing the minimum of $120,000 by issuing 787,500 units at $0.16 each. Additionally, Electro met a crucial condition for its proposed reverse take-over with BWR by making a $100,000 annual option payment for the Magusi-Fabie Bay property and issuing 4 million shares to the Optionor by the January 31, 2025 deadline. Further discussions are ongoing for additional equity subscriptions to cover business combination costs.

news.headline: Biotech company Benitec Biopharma reports Q2 2025 financial results and an operational update.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, which is a significant improvement from the previous year's rate of 6.2%. The report also highlights that the number of new job openings has increased by 10% compared to last quarter, reaching a total of 2.5 million. Additionally, average hourly wages have seen a slight increase of 2.5% over the last six months. Experts attribute this positive trend to the growing economy and increased consumer spending. On the flip side, inflation has risen by 3.2% in the same period, leading to concerns about the impact on consumers' purchasing power. Overall, the data portrays a mixed economic outlook with improvements in employment indicators but with potential challenges posed by inflation.

news.headline: Thousand-year-old temple fair held in Henan, China at the17th Central Plains Folk Culture Festival on Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Xun County, China, on February 6, 2025, during the 17th Central Plains (Hebi) Folk Culture Festival on the ninth day of the first lunar month, the Dapishan Temple Fair was celebrated. The event showcased traditional Chinese folk culture through various performances and activities.

news.headline: Anacapa Advisors wins Best Asset Manager for Family Offices at 2025 PAM Awards for the third year in a row.
news.summary: A hedge fund headquartered in California, Anacapa Advisors, has once again been recognized at the PAM awards for the third consecutive year. The firm, specializing in market-directional investment management, was awarded the title of Best Asset Manager for Family at the prestigious event held in Pacific Palisades, California on February 14, 2025. This accolade marks a significant achievement for Anacapa Advisors in the finance industry.

news.headline: Stocks dip ahead of market open as GameStop, DraftKings, Roku surge. Follow for live updates.
Palo Alto Networks beats fiscal Q2 earnings estimates; annual recurring revenue tops views, but guidance disappoints investors.
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks exceeded expectations with its fiscal Q2 earnings report, with annual recurring revenue surpassing projections. However, despite the positive earnings report, investor reaction was muted due to underwhelming guidance and key financial metrics.

news.headline: Newmark Group, Inc. announces Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, with conference call scheduled at 10:00 a.m. ET today.
news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled to discuss the latest results at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time today. On February 14, 2025, Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor serving major institutional investors globally, announced this.

news.headline: Moderna Inc. reports Q4 loss, $966M in sales, down from $2.81B last year, due to decrease in vaccine sales. Stock falls.
news.summary: Moderna Inc. revealed a fourth-quarter EPS loss of $(2.91), falling short of the anticipated $(2.62) and a stark contrast to the EPS income of $0.55 in the previous year. The COVID-19 vaccine manufacturer generated quarterly sales of $966 million, a notable decline compared to $2.81 billion in the previous year but surpassing the forecast of $942.8 million. Net product sales for the fourth quarter of 2024 reached $938 million, exhibiting a significant 66% decrease compared to the previous year. This drop was mainly attributed to the expedited launch of the updated COVID-19 vaccine in the U.S., causing sales to shift to the third quarter. International sales also saw a decline from 2023 due to the phasing out of advance purchase agreements. Within the $923 million Spikevax (COVID-19 vaccine) sales in Q4 2024, $244 million came from U.S. sales.

news.headline: Outlook Therapeutics reports Q1 FY 2025 financials, targets Q1 CY2025 BLA resubmission, Q2 CY2025 launches in Germany and UK. FY2024 Q1 net income $17.4M, updated gross proceeds at $17.8M. Detailed clinical and regulatory updates provided, along with anticipation of potential FDA approval in Q3 CY2025.
news.summary: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. announced its FDA BLA resubmission target for ONS-5010 / LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg) for Q1 CY2025. The first commercial launches of LYTENAVA™ in Germany and the UK are planned for Q2 CY2025. The company has received Marketing Authorization for LYTENAVA™ in the EU and UK for wet AMD treatment. Over 2.5 million off-label bevacizumab injections are administered annually in Europe, making LYTENAVA™ significant. ONS-5010 did not meet the non-inferiority endpoint in the recent NORSE EIGHT trial at week 8, but showed improvements at week 12. Financially, for Q1 2024, the company reported a net income of $17.4 million. They had $5.7 million in cash by December 31, 2024. Key milestones ahead include potential US FDA approval of ONS-5010 in Q3 CY2025. Management also received $17.8 million gross proceeds from a warrant exercise inducement. Bevacizumab gamma is an important therapy for wet AMD, with the goal to provide effective treatment options globally.

news.headline: Ghana's President in talks with IMF to improve program, aiming for economic stability.
Verizon (NYSE, NASDAQ: VZ) to redeem debt securities on March 18, 2025.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, NASDAQ: VZ) has disclosed the redemption of certain notes on March 18, 2025. The announcement was made on February 14, 2025, in New York. The specific details of the notes and redemption process were not provided in the news release.

news.headline: 2025 Nassau Paradise Island Wine & Food Festival lineup includes Alon Shaya, Bobby Flay, JJ Johnson, José Andrés, among others, with musical performances by GRAMMY® award-winners.
news.summary: The lineup for the third annual festival has been announced, featuring acclaimed chefs such as Alon Shaya, Bobby Flay, JJ Johnson, José Andrés, Kardea Brown, Katie Lee, Michael Symon, and Michael White, as well as local Bahamian chefs and restaurateurs. In addition to the culinary talent, there will be musical performances by a GRAMMY® Award-winner.

news.headline: Establishment Labs (NASDAQ: ESTA) to announce Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 26. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET. Dial (877) 407-8037 to participate.
news.summary: Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA), a global medical technology company focused on enhancing women’s health, specifically in breast aesthetics and reconstruction, is set to disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding December 31, 2024. Those interested can join the call by dialing (877) 407-8037 (U.S.).

news.headline: CBL Properties (NYSE: CBL) reported strong Q4 & 2024 results in Chattanooga, Tenn, with financial statements prepared according to GAAP.
news.summary: CBL Properties disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2024. The reported results conform to GAAP standards. Further details on supplemental non-GAAP financial metrics and their reconciliation with respective GAAP figures can be found in the full press release. For the three months ending December 31, 2024, and the entire fiscal year, the company's financial outcomes were revealed following the standards set by GAAP.

news.headline: Sprinklr to release Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on March 12, 2025. Market open announcement.
news.summary: Sprinklr, a leading customer experience management company, will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025 before the market opens on March 12, 2025. Investors and analysts are eagerly awaiting the report to gain insights into the company's performance during this period. This announcement signifies an important milestone for Sprinklr as stakeholders anticipate key numbers and data that will provide a comprehensive overview of its financial standing and operational success for the specified periods.

news.headline: Lexmark recognized as leader in Cloud Managed Print Services by IDC Marketscape for excelence in AI, security, and document workflow optimization.
news.summary: Lexmark, a leading provider of imaging and IoT solutions based in Lexington, Kentucky, has been recognized for its exceptional performance in artificial intelligence, security, and document workflow enhancement by IDC Marketscape. The report highlights Lexmark's dedication to delivering high-quality managed print services (MPS) and cloud solutions. This recognition comes as Lexmark continues to prioritize innovation and excellence in its offerings. The report, released on February 14, 2025, underscores Lexmark's success in these key areas, reaffirming its position as a top performer in the industry.

news.headline: ProFrac Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ACDC) to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 6, 2025, 11:00 a.m. Eastern.

(NASDAQ: ACDC) revealed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before hosting a conference call on Thursday, March 6, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET / 10:00 a.m. CT. Following the call, a recording of the webcast will be accessible in the IR Calendar section of the company's website.

news.headline: TT platform wins Derivatives Trading System of the Year at FOW International Awards for 3rd time in a row.
news.summary: Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a provider of global capital markets technology platform services, has secured its third consecutive win for the Derivatives Trading System of the Year award. The company received this recognition in both Chicago and London on February 14, 2025. This achievement highlights TT's industry-leading performance in the derivatives trading sector.

news.headline: UNLEASH and The Josh Bersin Company partner to shape AI in HR, leading authority on HR, talent, and AI-driven workforce.
news.summary: Las Vegas, on February 14, 2025 - A notable collaboration has been confirmed between UNLEASH and The Josh Bersin Company, two distinguished entities in the HR industry. UNLEASH, a renowned event and media platform for HR advancements, has joined forces with The Josh Bersin Company, a prominent figure specializing in HR, talent management, and AI-driven workforce evolution. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the realm of HR innovation.

news.headline: ICM announces 2025 Impact Awards in NY, honoring 3 recipients in Washington, D.C. - Brian Trelstad, Cynthia Muller, and Kendall Bedford.

Brian Trelstad was named one of the three recipients of the Impact Awards by the Impact Capital Managers (ICM) membership association. The awards ceremony is scheduled to take place in New York on an unspecified date in February 2025. This marks the third year that the Impact Awards will be presented.

news.headline: Kexing Biopharm's GB05 IND approved by U.S. FDA. Human Interferon α1b Inhalation Solution. Stock Code: 688136.SH.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 14, 2025, Kexing Biopharm Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 688136.SH) made public the news regarding the approval of the Investigational New Drug Application (IND) for GB05, a Human Interferon α1b Inhalation Solution. This product was developed in-house by the company's wholly-owned subsidiary.

news.headline: Pyxus International's CFO, Flavia Landsberg, resigns on February 28, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Morrisville, North Carolina, Pyxus International, Inc., a global agricultural company, made public the resignation of Flavia Landsberg, their executive vice president and CFO. This change will be effective from February 28, 2025. Pyxus International, Inc. is listed on OTC Pink under the ticker symbol PYYX.

news.headline: BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) reports Q4 & full year 2024 results, declares 2 cents quarterly dividend.
news.summary: BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) has announced a quarterly dividend of 2 cents and will hold a conference call today at 11:00 AM ET to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company declared these results in New York on February 14, 2025. Investors can participate in the call to gain insights into the performance and strategic outlook of BGC Group, Inc.

news.summary: A renowned global developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment, Snail Games (Nasdaq: SNAL), based in Culver City, California, announced on February 14, 2025, significant milestones in the evolution of the ARK universe. The company introduced the expansion of the franchise with ARK: Ultimate Mobile Edition.

news.headline: AAM's Q4 2024 saw $1.38B in sales, reporting solid full-year 2024 adjusted EBITDA growth.
news.summary: AAM announced strong growth in adjusted EBITDA for the full year 2024 in Detroit on February 14, 2025. American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM), listed as AXL on NYSE, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. In the fourth quarter alone, AAM recorded sales totaling $1.38 billion.

news.headline: XRP up 10% to $2.70 as SEC acknowledges ETF filing, potentially leading to Wall Street adoption.
news.summary: XRP has regained attention as the SEC acknowledged the filing of a spot XRP ETF by Grayscale and NYSE Arca, potentially expediting XRP's adoption on Wall Street. Currently, XRP is priced at $2.70, marking a 10% increase over the past 24 hours. This surge surpasses other major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin trading at $96,600 (+0.7%) and Ethereum standing at $2,682 (+0.7%). The market's focus on XRP intensifies as it outshines its counterparts. It is noteworthy that XRP's resilience contrasts with the slight dips in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin. The cryptocurrency community has long been advocating for wider acceptance and integration of digital assets into traditional financial systems.
